description: Remove all bun references from the slack plugin, replacing with npm equivalents
qualityChecks: cd plugins/slack && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace bun with npm in slack plugin
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the slack plugin to use npm instead of bun so that the project is consistently Node/npm-based
acceptanceCriteria: The check script in package.json uses 'npm run' instead of 'bun run'
No remaining references to 'bun' exist in the plugin directory
cd plugins/slack && npm run build passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Two changes needed:

1. plugins/slack/package.json line 37: change the 'check' script from 'bun run build && bun run type-check && bun run lint && bun run format:check' to 'npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check'

2. plugins/slack/.gitignore line 4: change 'bun.lock' to 'package-lock.json'

These are the only two files in the plugin that reference bun.
